summary: Justin Brennan provides a brief tutorial on how to book weekly accountability calls with a success coach through the AIOS platform backend. The video is administrative guidance about accessing mentorship support resources rather than deal-specific content.
takeaways: Book a call with your success coach once per week maximum
Access the booking link by scrolling to 'book a call with your coach' in the backend
Calls are in addition to weekly sessions with Justin and the team
title: WEEKLY ACCOUNTABILITY COACH
